+----------------------+
|                      |
|      +---------+     |
|      |  Write  |     |
|      +---------+     |
|           ^          |
|           |          |
|     +-----+----+     |
|     |  Format  |     |
|     +----------+     |
|           ^          |
|           |          |
|           |          |
|  Output Stage        |
+-----------------o----+
            +-----+
            |
            |
            |
            |
            |
+-----------o----------+
|           |          |
|           |          |
|     +-----+-----+    |
|     |  Convert  |    |
|     +-----------+    |
|           ^          |
|           |          |
|    +------+-----+    |
|    |  Validate  |    |
|    +------------+    |
|           ^          |
|           |          |
|  Transform Stage     |
+--------------------o-+
           +---------+
           |
           |
           |
           |
           |
           |
           |
           |
           |
           |
           |
+----------o-----------+
|          |           |
|          |           |
|     +----+----+      |
|     |  Parse  |      |
|     +---------+      |
|          ^           |
|          |           |
|     +----+---+       |
|     |  Read  |       |
|     +--------+       |
|                      |
|  Input Stage         |
+----------------------+
